chunks.text: EM-trust: a Robust Reputation Algorithm for Peer-to-peer Marketplaces (CSD-05-1400) by Jonathan Traupman and Robert Wilensky. Experiments in Improving Unsupervised Word Sense Disambiguation (CSD-03-1227) by Jonathan Traupman and Robert Wilensky. Robust Hyperlinks Cost Just Five Words Each (CSD-00-1091) by Thomas A. Phelps and Robert Wilensky. Multivalent Documents: A New Model for Digital Documents (CSD-98-999) by Robert Wilensky and Thomas Phelps.

An Experiment in Enhancing Information Access by Natural Language Processing (CSD-97-963) by Isaac Cheng and Robert Wilensky. Extending the Lexicon by Exploiting Subregularities (CSD-91-618) by Robert Wilensky. Sentences, Situations and Propositions (CSD-90-585) by Robert Wilensky. The Berkeley UNIX Consultant Project (CSD-89-520) by Robert Wilensky, David N. Chin, Marc Luria, James H. Martin, James Mayfield and Dekai Wu.

Primal Content and Actual Content: An Antidote to Literal Meaning (CSD-87-365) by Robert Wilensky. Some Problems and Proposals for Knowledge Representation (CSD-87-351) by Robert Wilensky. UC -- A Progress Report (CSD-87-303) by Robert Wilensky, James Mayfield, Anthony Albert, Robert Chin, Charles Cox, Marc Luria, James H. Martin and Dekai Wu. Talking to UNIX in English: An Overview of an On-line UNIX Consultant (CSD-82-104) by Robert Wilensky.
